mapper.sql: id, user_id, scene_scope, snapshot_date, learning_score, career_score, execution_score, overall_score, risk_level, headline, summary_json, source_digest_json, fallback_only, status, fail_reason, generated_at, expire_at, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: select from ai_growth_coach_snapshot where user_id = #{userId} and scene_scope = #{sceneScope} and status = 'READY' order by generated_at desc, id desc limit 1
select from ai_growth_coach_snapshot where id = #{id} limit 1
select count(1) from ai_growth_coach_snapshot where date(create_time) = current_date()
select count(1) from ai_growth_coach_snapshot where status = 'FAILED'
select count(1) from ai_growth_coach_snapshot where fallback_only = 1
select count(1) from ai_growth_coach_snapshot where scene_scope = #{sceneScope}
select from ai_growth_coach_snapshot where status = 'FAILED' or fallback_only = 1 order by generated_at desc, id desc limit #{limit}
